sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42498" key="e)riopwle/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐριο-πωλέω</orth>, <sense id="n42498.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sell</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deal in wool,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:28" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.28</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
